title: SEBANANI v. UBUSHINJACYAHA
text:
SEBANANI v. UBUSHINJACYAHA
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE – RPAA 00299/2025/CA (Kanyange, P.J.) 21
Ugushyingo 2025]
Amategeko agenga imiburanishirize y’imanza nshinjabyaha – Icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana –
Ibimenyetso – Mu manza nshinjabyaha, ibimenyetso byose bishobora gushingirwaho mu gihe
bigaragaza ukuri kw’ibyabaye (principe de la liberté de la preuve en matière pénale) ababuranyi
bakaba barahawe uburyo bwo kuhaba ngo banyomozanye, urukiko nirwo rwemeza ko ibyo
bimenyetso bishobora kwemerwa.
Incamake y’ikibazo: Uwitwa Mujawamariya Odette yareze Sebanani Severin mu Bugenzacyaha
avuga ko yasambanyije umwana we (wa Sebanani) w’imyaka 11 witwa U.U.F yabyaranye
n’umugore babanaga nyuma bakaza gutandukana, ibyo bituma Sebanani atangira gukurikiranwa.
Nyuma y’iperereza, Ubushinjacyaha bwareze Sebanani mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Muhanga
icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana, bushingiye ku bimenyetso bigizwe n’imvugo z’uwo mwana,
iz’abatangabuhamya hamwe na raporo ya muganga, bityo bumusabira guhanishwa igifungo cya
burundu. Uregwa yaburanye ahakana icyaha, avuga ko ari icyo yahimbiwe bitewe
n’amakimbiranye yari afitanye na nyina w’umwana.
Urukiko rwasesenguye ibimenyetso bitandukanye byatanzwe n’Ubushinjacyaha, rusanga ibyo
bimenyetso bikomeye kandi bidashidikanywaho, maze rwemeza ko Sebanani ahamwa n’icyaha
cyo gusambanya umwana, rumuhanisha igifungo cya burundu.
Sebanani yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru / Urugereko rwa Nyanza, avuga ko Urukiko Rwisumbuye
rwamuhamije icyaha atakoze, avuga kandi ko mu mvugo z’uwo mwana harimo kwivuguruza.
Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha yasubije avuga ko ibyo umwana yavuze ko yicuye agasanga nta
kariso yambaye kandi yayiraranye ari ukuri, kuko umwana w’imyaka 11 aba azi ibyamubayeho,
bityo asaba ko hagumaho imikirize y’urubanza rwajuririwe.
Urukiko rwasanze Sebanani atarabashije kuvuguruza ibimenyetso byashingiweho n’Urukiko rwa
mbere, hamwe na raporo ya muganga igaragaza ko nta karangabusugi umwana afite kandi ko yari
afite udusebe ku gitsina, maze rwemeza ariko ko uregwa akwiye kugabanyirizwa igihano kuko
ari ubwa mbere akurikiranwe mu nkiko mu buryo buzwi kandi nta kigaragaza ko hari indi
myitwarire mibi yari asanganwe, bityo rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka 22.
Sebanani yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire, we n’umwunganira bavuga ko Urukiko rwamuhamije
icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana kandi we nk’uregwa atarapimwe ngo ibizamini bye bihuzwe
n’iby’uwo mwana mu rwego rwo kugaragaza ukuri, avuga kandi ko imvugo za nyina w’umwana
zitagombaga gushingirwaho kuko bafitanye amakimbirane.
Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga ko izo mpamvu nta shingiro zifite, kuko nta kintu cyafashwe
mu gitsina cy’umwana (samples) kuburyo cyari gupimwa, kandi ko nta bimenyetso yatanze
bigaragaza amakimbirane avuga ko yari afitanye na nyina w’umwana.

Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rwasuzumye ibijyanye no kumenya niba Urukiko rwaragombaga gupimisha
Sebanani Severin no kumenya niba imvugo za nyina w’umwana ashinjwa gusambanya
zitaragombaga gushingirwaho.
Incamake y’icyemezo: Mu manza nshinjabyaha, ibimenyetso byose bishobora gushingirwaho
mu gihe bigaragaza ukuri kw’ibyabaye (principe de la liberté de la preuve en matière pénale)
ababuranyi bakaba barahawe uburyo bwo kuhaba ngo banyomozanye, urukiko nirwo rwemeza ko
ibyo bimenyetso bishobora kwemerwa.
Ubujurire nta shingiro bufite.
Amategeko yashingiweho:
Itegeko N°15/2004 ryo ku wa 12/06/2004 ryerekeye ibimenyetso mu manza n’itangwa ryabyo,
ingingo ya 119.
Imanza zifashishijwe:
Urubanza RPAA 00692/2021/CA rw’Ubushinjacyaha na Ndayishimiye; rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 20/01/2023;
Urubanza RPAA 00199/2025/CA rw’Ubushinjacyaha na Umuhire Udahemuka na Habumugisha
Egide, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 30/10/2025.
Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Uwitwa Mujawamariya Odette yareze Sebanani Severin mu Bugenzacyaha ko
yasambanyije umwana we (wa Sebanani ) w’imyaka 11 witwa U.U.F1 yabyaranye n’umugore
babanaga nyuma bakaza gutandukana, uwo mwana na musaza we bakaba barabanaga na nyirakuru
Mujawamariya Odette; ko uwo mwana yababwiye ko ubwo we na musaza we bari bagiye gusura
se, baryamanye uko ari batatu we aryama hagati, yicuye yumva yambaye ubusa se arimo
kumusambanya, bucyeye ahita ataha se adahari abibwira nyirakuru, bituma Sebanani Severin
atangira gukurikiranwa.
[2] Nyuma y’iperereza, Ubushinjacyaha bwareze Sebanani Severin mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye
rwa Muhanga icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana, bushingiye ku bimenyetso bigizwe n’imvugo
z’uwo mwana, iz’abatangabuhamya na raporo ya muganga, bumusabira guhanishwa igifungo cya
burundu.
[3] Sebanani Severin yaburanye ahakana icyaha, avuga ko ari icyo yahimbiwe bitewe
n’amakimbiranye yari afitanye na nyina wa U.U.F.
[4] Mu rubanza RP 00484/2020/TGI/MHG rwaciwe ku wa 18/02/2021, Urukiko
rwasesenguye ibimenyetso byatanzwe n’Ubushinjacyaha bigizwe n’imvugo za U.U.F. ushinja se
1 Yahawe iri zina kuko ari umwana

ko yakangutse agasanga yamukuyemo ikariso arimo kumusambanya akabibwira musaza we
akanamusaba ko ari we waryama hagati ariko akabyanga, bwacya agataha igitaraganya yagera kwa
nyirakuru agahita abimubwira, bagahita bamujyana kwa muganga maze raporo ikagaragaza ko mu
gitsina cye hari harimo udusebe, rusanga rero ibyo bimenyetso bikomeye kandi
bidashidikanywaho, rubishingiraho rwemeza ko Sebanani Severin ahamwa n’icyaha cyo
gusambanya umwana, rumuhanisha igifungo cya burundu.
[5] Sebanani Severin yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru/Urugereko rwa Nyanza, avuga ko Urukiko
rwamuhamije icyaha atakoze, ko ahubwo byatewe n’amakimbirane yari afitanye na nyina w’uwo
mwana wamukoresheje ngo amubeshyere, ko kandi mu mvugo z’uwo mwana harimo
kwivuguruza, kuko yavuze ko yicuye agasanga yambaye ubusa, yongera kubwira nyirakuru ko
yakangutse agasanga se arimo kumusambanya, mu gihe musaza we bari kumwe abihakana.
[6] Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha yasubije ko ibyo umwana yavuze ko yicuye agasanga nta
kariso yambaye kandi yayiraranye ari ukuri, kuko umwana w'imyaka 11 aba azi ibyamubayeho,
kandi ko Sebanani Severin nawe yemera ko bararanye, asaba ko hagumaho imikirize y’urubanza
rwajuririwe.
[7] Mu rubanza RPA 00258/2021/HC/NYZ rwaciwe ku wa 28/02/2025, Urukiko rwasanze
Sebanani Severin atarabashije kuvuguruza ibimenyetso byashingiweho n’Urukiko rwa mbere,
bigizwe n’imvugo z’umwana we wasobanuye ko yicuye agasanga arimo kumusambanya
akabibwira musaza we bari baryamanye, bwacya agataha se adahari akabibwira nyirakuru; raporo
y’Ubuyobozi bw’Inzego z’Ibanze yemeza ko Sebanani Severin amaze kumenya ko icyaha yakoze
cyamenyekanye, yatangiye kwihisha akitwaza ibyuma avuga ko uzashaka kumufata azamwica;
imvugo za nyirakuru w’umwana wasobanuye ibyo uyu yamubwiye na raporo ya muganga
igaragaza ko nta karangabusugi afite kandi ko yari afite udusebe ku gitsina. Rwasanze ariko
akwiye kugabanyirizwa igihano kuko ari ubwa mbere akurikiranwe mu nkiko mu buryo buzwi
kandi nta kigaragaza ko hari indi myitwarire mibi yari asanganwe, rumuhanisha igifungo
cy’imyaka 22.
[8] Sebanani Severin yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire, urubanza ruhabwa RPAA
00299/2025/CA, iburanisha ribera mu ruhame ku wa 04/11/2025 Sebanani Severin yunganiwe na
Me Munyaneza Gonzague, Ubushinjacyaha buhagarariwe na Uwanziga Lydia, Umushinjacyaha
ku rwego rw’Igihugu.
[9] Mu myanzuro y’ubujurire no mu miburanire, Sebanani Severin n’umwunganira bavuga ko
Urukiko rwamuhamije icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana kandi atarapimwe ngo ibizamini bye
bihuzwe n’iby’uwo mwana mu rwego rwo kugaragaza ukuri, ko n’imvugo za nyina w’umwana
zitagombaga gushingirwaho kuko bafitanye amakimbirane kandi akaba avuga ibyo yabwiwe
n’uwo mwana.
[10] Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga ko izo mpamvu nta shingiro zifite, kuko nta kintu
cyafashwe mu gitsina cy’umwana (samples) kuburyo cyari gupimwa, ko kandi amakimbirane
Sebanani Severin avuga ko yari afitanye na nyina w’umwana nta bimenyetso ayagaragariza.

[11] Muri uru rubanza harasuzumwa ibijyanye no kumenya niba Urukiko rwaragombaga
gupimisha Sebanani Severin no kumenya niba imvugo za nyina w’umwana ashinjwa gusambanya
zitaragombaga gushingirwaho.
II. ISESENGURA RY’IBIBAZO BIRI MU RUBANZA
Kumenya niba Urukiko rwaragombaga gupimisha Sebanani Severin no kumenya niba
imvugo za nyina w’umwana zitaragombaga gushingirwaho
[12] Sebanani Severin n’umwunganira basaba ko hakosorwa inenge ziri mu manza zabanje,
zirimo kuba atarapimwe ngo ibizamini bye bihuzwe n’iby’umwana ashinjwa gusambanya kugira
ngo bigaragaze ukuri kw’ibyabaye, ko rero nawe yagombaga gupimwa hakarebwa niba igitsina
cye cyarahuye n’icy’uwo mwana, hakanarebwa ko hari ibimenyetso byavuye kuri uwo mwana biri
kuri Sebanani Severin mu gihe yari kuba atakarabye, kuko hari ibindi byatera ibisebe muganga
yabonye ku gitsina cy’umwana ndetse n’ibyatuma akarangabusugi kavaho, cyane cyane ko raporo
ya muganga itemeza ko umwana yasambanyijwe ahubwo igaragaza ko nta karangabusugi afite, ko
afite ibisebe ku gitsina nta n’amasohoro amuriho, mu gihe umwana avuga ko yaryamye yambaye
ikariso agakanguka ntayo yambaye kandi ko yumvise atose, kuba rero muganga atarabonye
amasohoro bikaba bitumvikana.
[13] Sebanani Severin n’umwunganira bavuga kandi ko Urukiko rwashingiye ku buhamya
bwatanzwe na nyina w’umwana kandi bafitanye amakimbirane, kuko bari barashakanye mu buryo
butemewe n’amategeko babana nabi bombi bashinjanya gucana inyuma, baratandukana, ko
ikigaragaza ayo makimbirane ari uko batakibana. Bavuga kandi ko imvugo za nyina w’umwana
zashingiweho hemezwa ko Sebanani Severin yararanye n’umwana ku buriri bumwe kandi
kurarana na we bitavuze kumusambanya, ndetse ko avuga ibyo atahagazeho kuko atari ahari
ahubwo ari ibyo yabwiwe n’umwana, bityo ko yagirwa umwere kuko nta bimenyetso bifatika
bimushinja icyaha uretse ubuhamya bw’abantu batari bahari, kandi bizwi ko bafitanye
amakimbirane, ko ahubwo uwo mwana yahamagazwa akagira ibyo asobanura kuko ubu ari
mukuru.
[14] Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga ko izo mpamvu nta shingiro zifite, kuko nta kintu
cyafashwe mu gitsina cy’umwana (samples) ku buryo cyari gupimwa, ko ikigaragara muri dosiye
ari uko umwana yasuzumwe na muganga agakora raporo agaragaza ko nta karangabusugi afite, ko
mu gitsina cye hatukura harimo udusebe kandi ko nta masohoro yari arimo, ko rero ibyari gukurwa
kuri Sebanani Severin, byari guhuzwa n’ibizamini by’umwana iyo mu gitsina cye hagaragamo
amasohoro, akaba ari yo mpamvu we atapimwe. Iyo raporo ya muganga kandi ikaba ari
ikimenyetso cyunganira ibindi bimenyetso byashingiweho birimo imvugo y’umwana wavuze ko
ari Sebanani Severin wamusambanyije, raporo y’inzego z’ibanze n’imvugo z’abatangabuhamya.
[15] Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga kandi ko amakimbirane Sebanani avuga ko yari
afitanye na nyina wa U.U.F. nta bimenyetso ayatangira nk’uko biteganywa n’ingingo ya 4
y’Itegeko N° 062/2024 ryo ku wa 20/06/2024 rigenga ibimenyetso22, ko n’ibyo avuga ko ibyo uwo
2 Iyo ngingo iteganya ko: “(1) Urega cyangwa utanze ikibazo agaragaza ikimenyetso cy’ibyo aregera cyangwa asaba.
Uwiregura agaragaza ikimenyetso gishyigikira ukwiregura kwe. Icyakora, umucamanza cyangwa ukemura ikibazo
ashobora gutegeka umuburanyi cyangwa umwe mu bafitanye ikibazo cyangwa undi muntu gutanga cyangwa
kwerekana ikimenyetso afite”.

mwana yavuze bitabayeho ahubwo ari ibyo yashyizwemo na nyina nta shingiro bifite, kuko atari
uwo mwana gusa ubivuga, ahubwo yanabibwiye musaza we bikimara kuba, amusaba ko yaryama
hagati aranga, hakaba n’imvugo z’uwo musaza we wasobanuye ko se akimara kumenya ko arimo
gushakishwa yamubwiye ko icyatumye U.U.F. ataha ari uko yanyaye ku buriri kandi atari byo.
Asanga kandi nta mpamvu yo gutumiza uwo mwana kuko ibyo yavuze icyaha kikimara kuba
aribyo bifite agaciro, akaba rero yaba aje kuvuga ibyo bamubwiye ngo ashinjure se, ko rero
Urukiko rwakwemeza ko ubujurire bwe nta shingiro bufite hakagumaho urubanza rwajuririwe.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
[16] Impaka muri uru rubanza zishingiye ku kumenya niba Urukiko rwarirengagije gupimisha
Sebanani Severin ngo ibizamini bye bihuzwe n’iby’umwana ashinjwa gusambanya, no kumenya
niba imvugo za nyina w’umwana zitaragombaga gushingirwaho kuko bafitanye amakimbirane
kandi akaba avuga ibyo yabwiwe n’umwana.
[17] Ku byerekeye ibimenyetso mu manza, mu rubanza RPAA 00692/2021/CA rwaciwe
n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 20/01/2023 haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Ndayishimiye Jean
Damascène, hasesenguwe ingingo ya 119 y’Itegeko N°15/2004 ryo ku wa 12/06/2004 ryerekeye
ibimenyetso mu manza n’itangwa ryabyo3, harebwe cyane cyane ku mwihariko w’imanza
nshinjabyaha, maze Urukiko rusobanura ko mu manza nshinjabyaha, ibimenyetso byose bishobora
gushingirwaho mu gihe bigaragaza ukuri kw’ibyabaye (principe de la liberté de la preuve en
matière pénale) ababuranyi bakaba barahawe uburyo bwo kuhaba ngo banyomozanye, kandi ko
urukiko arirwo rwemeza ko ibyo bimenyetso bishobora kwemerwa. Iri hame ryashingiweho mu
zindi manza zakurikiyeho zaciwe n’uru Rukiko, urwaciwe bwa nyuma akaba ari urubanza RPAA
00199/2025/CA, rwaciwe ku wa 30/10/2025, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Umuhire Udahemuka
Régis na Habumugisha Egide.
[18] Kugira ngo Sebanani Severin ahamwe n’icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana, inkiko zabanje
zabishingiye ku bimenyetso bigizwe n’imvugo z’umwana we wasobanuye ko yicuye agasanga
arimo kumusambanya akabibwira musaza we bari baryamanye, bugacya ataha se adahari agahita
abibwira nyirakuru, raporo y’Ubuyobozi bw’Inzego z’Ibanze yemeza ko Sebanani Severin amaze
kumenya ko icyaha yakoze cyamenyekanye yatangiye kwihisha akitwaza ibyuma avuga ko
uzashaka kumufata azamwica, imvugo za nyirakuru w’uwo mwana wasobanuye ibyo yamubwiye
na raporo ya muganga igaragaza ko nta karangabusugi afite kandi ko yari afite udusebe ku gitsina.
[19] Ku birebana na U.U.F., mu nyandikomvugo ye yo mu Bugenzacyaha, yavuze ko ku wa
27/03/2020 saa 02h46’ bwenda gucya ubwo yari aryamanye na se na musaza we, yumvise se arimo
kumusambanya, asobanura ko yaryamye yambaye ikanzu n’ikariso ari hagati ya se na musaza we,
bigeze ayo masaha yumva yambaye ubusa se arimo kumusambanya, agira ubwoba bwo gusakuza,
yumvise akangutse ahita amanura ikanzu arayimwambika, bucyeye arakaraba azinga imyenda ye
se adahari arataha, abwira musaza we ko se yamusambanyije, ageze kwa nyirakuru nawe
arabimubwira.
3 Iyo ngingo ihura n’ingingo ya 87 y’Itegeko Nº 062/2024 ryo ku wa 20/06/2024 rigenga ibimenyetso.

[20] Naho mu nyandikomvugo ya musaza wa U.U.F., witwa Amani Chris Brown, yavuze ko
babyutse nijoro U.U.F. akamubwira ko atazongera kurara hagati kuko se amukora ku gitsina
akanamusoma, ko bukeye U.U.F. yahise azinga imyenda ye arataha avuga ko se yamufashe ku
ngufu, se atashye asanga yagiye, amubwira ko yajyanywe n’uko yanyaye ku buriri kandi ntabyo
yari yakoze, ko yahise ajya kwa nyirakuru ubyara se nyuma se yumvise bavuga ko arimo guhigwa
kuko yafashe umwana ku ngufu ntiyongera kumubona, agaruka ku munsi uwo mwana yagombaga
gutahiraho.
[21] Muri dosiye harimo kandi raporo ya muganga wasuzumye U.U.F., igaragaza ko nta
masohoro (spermatozoïde) yamubonetseho, mu mwanzuro agaragaza ku myanya ndangagitsina ye
hari hatukuye hariho n’udusebe (genital examination revealed redness with small lacerations on
labia minora), ko nta karangabusugi agifite (no hymen found), ko n’ibizamini bya raboratwari
byagaragaje ko afite uburwayi (urogenital infection).
[22] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga ibyo Sebanani Severin n’umwunganira bavuga ko raporo
ya muganga itagaragaza ko umwana yasambanyijwe, bitahabwa ishingiro kuko muganga
wamusuzumye yagaragaje ko myanya ndangagitsina ye hari hatukuye kandi hariho udusebe duto,
iyo raporo kandi ikaba itagomba kurebwa ukwayo ahubwo ireberwa hamwe n’ibindi bimenyetso,
muri byo hakaba harimo imvugo z’umwana umushinja kumusambanya, imvugo za musaza w’uwo
mwana yabwiye ko se yamusambanyije, n’iza nyirakuru w’uwo mwana wavuze ibyo yamubwiye
akimugeraho.
[23] Ku bivugwa na Sebanani Severin n’umwunganira ko ibimenyetso byagaragajwe na raporo
ya muganga bishobora guterwa n’ibindi bintu, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga nta shingiro bifite
kuko ibyo bindi bavuga ko byabitera ntabyo muganga yagaragaje, bakaba kandi badasobanura
impurirane yo kuba Sebanani yarararanye n’umwana akavuga ko yamusambanyije, akabibwira
musaza we, bugacya ataha se adahari, yagera kwa nyirakuru agahita avuga ibyo se yamukoreye
akajyanwa kwa muganga, raporo yakozwe ikagaragaza ibimenyetso birebana n’ihohoterwa
ry’igitsina, yahuzwa n’imvugo z’uwo mwana bikagaragaza ko iryo hohoterwa ari ingaruka
z’igikorwa yavuze ko yakorewe na se.
[24] Ku bijyanye n’uko Sebanani Severin atapimwe ngo ibizamini bye bihuzwe n’iby’umwana
aregwa gusambanya, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga iyo mpamvu nayo nta shingiro ifite kuko
hari raporo ya muganga yuzuzanya n’ibindi bimenyetso Urukiko rwashingiyeho rumuhamya
icyaha ku buryo kuba atarapimwe ntacyo byahindura ku gaciro k’ibyo bimenyetso.
[25] Ku byo SEBANANI Severin n’umwunganira bavuga ko bitumvikana ukuntu muganga
atabonye amasohoro kuri U.U.F. kandi yaravuze ko yaryamye yambaye ikariso agakanguka ntayo
yambaye kandi atose, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga iby’uko yari atose nta bigaragara mu
nyandikomvugo ye, ahubwo yasobanuye ko mbere yo kuva kwa se yabanje gukaraba, bikaba rero
byari gutuma hari ibimenyetso bitamubonekaho.
[26] Ku birebana n’imvugo za nyina w’umwana, Sebanani Severin n’umwunganira bavuga ko
zitagombaga gushingirwaho kuko bafite ibyo bapfa, ndetse ko avuga ibyo yabwiwe n’umwana,
Urukiko rurasanga mu manza zaciwe n’inkiko zabanje, ntaho izo mvugo zashingiweho ahubwo
hashingiwe ku mvugo z’umwana n’iza nyirakuru.

[27] Ku bisabwa na Sebanani Severin n’umwunganira ko U.U.F. yahamagazwa akagira ibyo
asobanura kuko ubu ari mukuru, Urukiko rurasanga atari ngombwa gutumiza uwo mwana, kuko
ibyo yavuze bikubiye mu nyandikomvugo yakorewe mu Bugenzacyaha iri muri dosiye, kandi
n’ubwo yari akiri umwana akaba atari kuyoberwa kuvuga ibyamubayeho harebwe ikigero yari
afite (imyaka 11); kuba rero yarakuze bikaba bitakwambura agaciro ibyo yavuze mbere, cyane
cyane ko bifite ibimenyetso bibishimangira bigizwe cyane cyane na raporo ya muganga,
n’abatangabuhamya yabibwiye, ndetse n’imyitwarire ya Sebanani Severin nyuma y’uko icyaha
kimenyekanye nk’uko yasobanuwe muri raporo y’inzego z’ibanze ikaba igaragaza ko hari icyo
yishinjaga.
[28] Hashingiwe ku byasobanuwe, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga kuba Sebanani Severin
atarasuzumwe bitatesha agaciro ibimenyetso byashingiweho kuko bigaragaza ukuri kw’ibyabaye,
kandi ko mu kumuhamya icyaha hatashingiwe ku mvugo za nyina w’umwana nk’uko abivuga,
bityo imikirize y’urubanza yajuririye ikaba idahindutse, hakanagumaho igifungo cy’imyaka
makumyabiri n’ibiri (22) yahanishijwe kubera ko gikwiranye n’uburemere bw’icyaha yakoze.
III. ICYEMEZO CY’ URUKIKO
[29] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwatanzwe na Sebanani Severin nta shingiro bufite;
[30] Rwemeje ko urubanza RPA 00258/2021/HC/NYZ rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru/Urugereko
rwa Nyanza ku wa 28/02/2025 rugumanye agaciro mu ngingo zarwo zose;
[31] Rutegetse ko igifungo cy’imyaka makumyabiri n’ibiri (22) Sebanani Severin yahanishijwe
ku cyaha cyo gusambanya umwana kigumyeho.
